turns.content: I just got back from two weeks in Japan. The food and culture were incredible.
Japan is amazing! What was your favorite part?
Kyoto was breathtaking. I want to go back someday.
Kyoto in cherry blossom season is unforgettable. Where are you thinking of going next?
I booked my next trip! Spending three weeks in Italy visiting Rome, Florence, and the Amalfi Coast.
Italy is a dream destination! Are you going for food, art, or both?
Definitely both. I want to take a pasta-making class in Bologna too.
That sounds like a perfect itinerary.
Back from Italy — it was even better than expected. Now I am planning a trip to Australia.
Incredible! What parts of Australia are on your list?
Sydney, the Great Barrier Reef, and hopefully Uluru.
That is quite an ambitious itinerary — Australia is huge.
Just landed in Morocco for my latest adventure. Marrakech is absolutely mesmerizing.
Morocco is so vivid and atmospheric. Have you visited the medina yet?
Yes! I got happily lost in the souks for hours. The spice market was overwhelming in the best way.
That sounds wonderful. Is this your fourth international trip this year?
